name: sysdesign-m1-data-model
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y postgresql-client && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh -s -- -y && $HOME/.local/bin/uv sync
postStartCommand: echo 'Dev container ready. DATABASE_URL points at db:5432. Try: make schema partitions seed drills'
